--- disabling  _possibly_less_than_minimum -> this apparently gets us to 997 across the board
--- which indicates that _possibly_less_than_minimum is not 100% correct
--- still not sure why it's missing the three, probably a subtle bug somewhere or vectors with [inf] or zero-length
--- * performance: it runs slower for low KeyRanksN and slightly faster for high [up to 9]
--- * performance: However, dcount is very high in general which will not perform well when those are stored on disk
--- * performance: also disabled bloom filter and the dcounts are exactly the same with/without, so it's probably not necessary with this configuration which would make sense
